name: GOLFTEC Easton
about: GOLFTEC Easton is a high-tech golf training studio focused on data-driven swing improvement. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion tracking, high-speed cameras, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing analysis. Lessons are structured around personalized game plans created by PGA-certified coaches, with a focus on measurable results and consistent improvement. Club fitting services are also offered using launch monitors to optimize club performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and high-speed video
Data-driven approach with launch monitors providing club and ball tracking
Personalized coaching plans focused on measurable improvement

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned as part of the tech suite

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or try equipment during fitting sessions. The facility provides clubs for lessons and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No on-site food or drink services are mentioned. BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than full simulated rounds. Typical lesson sessions last 60 minutes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Junior programs are mentioned as part of the services offered. The facility appears suitable for youth golf instruction.
